[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010000 2
1 00100110 3
2 00000001 1
3 11010000 3
4 00101001 3
5 00010100 2
6 11011110 6
7 10101001 4

01 10 10001000 2
12 21 10001000 2
23 32 01010000 2 match 0
34 43 00100110 3 match 1
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 11000000 2
67 76 10001000 2
70 07 10011100 4

02 20 11011000 4
13 31 00100000 1
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 01010000 2 match 0
46 64 00100001 2
57 75 10010000 2
60 06 11001000 3
71 17 10001000 2

03 30 01010110 4
14 41 00100001 2
25 52 11010000 3 match 3
36 63 01100000 2
47 74 00000100 1
50 05 11010000 3 match 3
61 16 10101001 4 match 7
72 27 10011000 3

04 40 00000110 2
15 51 10000000 1
26 62 11001000 3
37 73 00010100 2 match 5
